messages.content: VocГӘ Г© um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migraГ§ГЈo multicloud e modernizaГ§ГЈo on-premises. Seja tГ©cnico, objetivo e nГЈo invente serviГ§os inexistentes.
Como configurar NSG para permitir comunicaГ§ГЈo entre instГўncias em diferentes subnets da mesma aplicaГ§ГЈo?

## NSG para ComunicaГ§ГЈo Entre Subnets

### CenГЎrio

AplicaГ§ГЈo 3-tier onde:
- Web tier: 10.0.1.0/24
- App tier: 10.0.2.0/24
- DB tier: 10.0.3.0/24

### Passos de ImplementaГ§ГЈo

**1. Criar NSG para a aplicaГ§ГЈo:**
```bash
app_nsg_id=$(oci network nsg create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT_ID \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --display-name "app-nsg" \
  --query "data.id" \
  --raw-output)
```

**2. Criar regra de inbound (app tier recebendo de web):**
```bash
oci network nsg rules create \
  --nsg-id $app_nsg_id \
  --direction "INGRESS" \
  --protocol "6" \
  --sourcecidr "10.0.1.0/24" \
  --destination-port-range "{\"min\": 8080, \"max\": 8080}" \
  --display-name "allow-web-to-app"
```

**3. Criar regra de inbound (db tier recebendo de app):**
```bash
oci network nsg-rules create \
  --nsg-id $app_nsg_id \
  --direction "INGRESS" \
  --protocol "6" \
  --sourcecidr "10.0.2.0/24" \
  --destination-port-range "{\"min\": 1521, \"max\": 1521}" \
  --display-name "allow-app-to-db"
```

**4. Criar regra de outbound (app para db):**
```bash
oci network nsg-rules create \
  --nsg-id $app_nsg_id \
  --direction "EGRESS" \
  --protocol "6" \
  --destinationcidr "10.0.3.0/24" \
  --destination-port-range "{\"min\": 1521, \"max\": 1521}" \
  --display-name "app-to-db"
```

**5. Criar regra outbound (app para internet via NAT):**
```bash
oci network nsg-rules create \
  --nsg-id $app_nsg_id \
  --direction "EGRESS" \
  --protocol "all" \
  --destinationcidr "0.0.0.0/0" \
  --display-name "app-to-internet"
```

**6. Associar NSG Г s instГўncias:**
```bash
# Ao criar instГўncia app tier
oci compute instance create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT_ID \
  --shape "VM.Standard2.1" \
  --subnet-id $APP_SUBNET_ID \
  --nsg-ids "[$app_nsg_id]" \
  --display-name "app-server"

# Adicionar NSG a VNIC existente
oci compute vnic attach \
  --instance-id $INSTANCE_ID \
  --nsg-ids "[$app_nsg_id]"
```

### VisualizaГ§ГЈo das Regras

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ NSG: app-nsg                                            в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Direction        в”Ӯ Rule                                  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ INGRESS          в”Ӯ TCP 10.0.1.0/24 вҶ’ :8080 (webвҶ’app)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ INGRESS          в”Ӯ TCP 10.0.2.0/24 вҶ’ :1521 (appвҶ’db)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ EGRESS           в”Ӯ TCP 10.0.3.0/24 вҶ’ :1521 (appвҶ’db)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ EGRESS           в”Ӯ ALL 0.0.0.0/0 (internet via NAT)     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Riscos e ConsideraГ§Гөes

| Risco | MitigaГ§ГЈo |
|-------|-----------|
| Regra muito aberta | Use portas especГӯficas, nГЈo "all" |
| Falta de outbound | Lembre que Stateful nГЈo se aplica igual |
| Debugging | Use VCN Flow Logs para auditar |

### Alternativas

- **Security List:** Se todas as VMs da subnet precisam das mesmas regras
- **Combo:** SL para rede base + NSG para aplicaГ§ГЈo
